data.lyric:
[Verse]
Sleigh bells ringin', choirs singin'
Snowflakes fallin', presents glistenin' (glistenin')
In the air, there's a feeling of joy
Spreadin' love to every girl and boy
[Verse 2]
Candles glowin', fire cracklin'
Stockings hangin', children wrappin'
With a smile, they unwrap their surprise
In their hearts, the magic never dies
[Chorus]
Jingle all the way (jingle all the way)
In the winter wonderland, we play (oh-oh)
Hear the carols echo through the night (echo through the night)
Merry Christmas, oh what a delight (oh-oh-oh)
data.title: Jingle All the Way

lyric.example:
[Verse]
Woke up with the sun in my eyes
No clouds above just blue in the skies
Shoes on my feet I’m ready to run
Every step feels like a loaded gun
[Chorus]
Happy days are rolling in
Let the joy beneath my skin
No more shadows no more lies
Just the truth that lifts me high
[Verse 2]
Dancing through the city streets
A rhythm pounding in my heartbeat
Strangers smile it’s catching on
This world’s a stage we’re all a song
[Chorus]
Happy days are rolling in
Let the joy beneath my skin
No more shadows no more lies
Just the truth that lifts me high
[Bridge]
Throw your worries out the door
Let them sink to the ocean floor
We’re alive and it’s enough
Life is messy but it’s love
[Chorus]
Happy days are rolling in
Let the joy beneath my skin
No more shadows no more lies
Just the truth that lifts me high
lyric.description: The lyrics which used to generate the audio.

model.description: The model adopted for generating music is FUZZ-2.0 by default.

title.description: The title when generating the song.

action.description: The action to generate the audio. If `generate`, the audio will be generated from the prompt.

custom.description: The flag indicates the music audio is custom or not, if true, the audio will be generated from the lyric, otherwise, the audio will be generated from the prompt

prompt.description: The prompt which used to generate the music audio and the prompt must be less than or equal 200

audio_id.description: The only id of the reference song.

continue_at.description: Decide where to start writing the song based on this parameter.

callback_url.description: The callback URL which will be called when the video is generated

seed.description: The seed for the audio generation

instrumental.description: If true, the generated audio will be instrumental only without lyrics.

sound_strength.description: The intensity of the audio prompt words can be selected between 0.2 and 1, with a default of 0.5.

lyrics_strength.description: The intensity of lyrics indicates the degree of influence of lyrics on audio generation and can be selected between 0 and 1, with a default of 0.5.

weirdness.description: The style uniqueness can be selected between 0 and 1, with a default of 0.5.

replace_section_end.description: Set the final time of the replacement fragment according to this parameter.

replace_section_start.description: Set the start time of the replacement fragment according to this parameter.

id.description: The ID of the riffusion task.

request.description: The request of the riffusion task.

response.description: The response of the riffusion task.

id.description: The ID of the producer task.

ids.description: The IDs of the producer tasks.

action.description: Operation type. Use 'retrieve' to get the single task, and 'retrieve_batch' to get the batch of multiple tasks.

data.text:
[Verse]
Snow is falling, all around
Children playing, having fun
It's the season, filled with cheer
Can you feel the magic near? (ooh-yeah)

[Verse 2]
Lights are twinkling, on the tree
Fireplace crackling, warmth and glee
Love is shared, with friends and kin
Let the celebrations begin! (oh-oh-oh)

[Chorus]
Dashing through the snow (hey)
In a one-horse open sleigh
Over fields we go (go)
Laughing all the way (ha haha)
Bells on bobtail ring (ring)
Making spirits bright (bright)
What fun it is to ride and sing
A sleighing song tonight! (yeah-yeah)
data.title: Winter Wonderland
